Piedmont Healthcare Clinical Note (Page 3) Functional status section

patient_summary: Olivia is a 73-year-old female (DOB recorded as 05/05/1952 in multiple sources) with documented mixed dyslipidemia, essential hypertension, and a history of postoperative/unspecified anemia. Recent labs from 07/03/2023 (Singing River) show Ferritin 266.8 (H) ng/mL, Iron 41 (L) ug/dL, Iron Saturation 15% (L), eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L) ml/min/1.73m2, triglycerides 158 (H) mg/dL, LDL 62 mg/dL, and TSH 1.320 mIU/mL. Prior labs (Piedmont) include elevated glucose 199 mg/dL (01/11/2021) and lipid panel CHOLTOTAL 136 (07/17/2020). Care teams include primary care (Hand, Hoyet A, MD; Hershey, Curtis L, MD) and specialty providers across cardiology, gastroenterology, and pulmonary services. Significant upcoming/ recent procedures include a colonoscopy with biopsy on 02/21/2025. Multiple social and functional assessments are documented, including tobacco and alcohol use entries and variable functional status assessments. Conflicting demographic and social-history items are preserved in conflicts for reconciliation.
